prompt: An ultra-wide 360-degree equirectangular panoramic view of a futuristic contemporary art gallery exhibition about artificial intelligence, designed for immersive VR viewing. The scene is inside a vast dark-ceilinged museum hall with exposed rigging, many small spotlights, polished reflective concrete floors, and curved white exhibition walls wrapping continuously across the panorama. The environment is filled with about 25 adult visitors in smart casual and business attire, standing in small conversational groups and scattered around the room, with subtle face blur or indistinct facial detail. At the exact center of the panorama is a circular installation platform containing a tall translucent holographic human figure made of white glowing particles and vertical strands of light, suspended beneath a large circular ceiling ring. On the left side, show a white robotic arm sculpture on a round pedestal in front of a giant wall artwork depicting a luminous side-profile human head composed of particles and constellation-like dots. Across the walls, include 6 visible AI-themed artworks total: 1 giant particle head mural, 3 framed cosmic nebula or galaxy images, 1 large monochrome abstract painting, and 1 tall colorful starfield-like digital piece in the far right background. On the right foreground, place a large transparent cube installation containing a swirling spiral galaxy projection in blue, violet, and white. Also include 2 small white service robots near the center-right area of the floor. Lighting is cinematic and cool-toned, with blue, purple, and white glows from the installations contrasting against the dark ceiling and neutral gallery architecture. The mood is sleek, high-end, intellectual, and techno-cultural, like an AI biennale or premium digital art fair. Render photorealistically with crisp architectural detail, realistic reflections, natural human scale, and full seamless 360 panorama distortion appropriate for an equirectangular image.
